name: risk-register-builder
description: Professional risk register builder for IT auditors and GRC professionals

scripts.dev: echo 'Run in two terminals: npm run dev:server && npm run dev:client'
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install

author: Rose Achar & William Asare Yirenkyi
